Home.cardDescription: Earn stamps on every purchase and redeem your rewards.

notifications.title: Notification preferences
notifications.description: Choose which channels you want promotions on. Important messages (codes, confirmations) always come through.
notifications.transactionalNote: Transactional notifications and OTP codes are always sent.

Offline.title: Offline
Offline.description: Looks like you lost connection. When you're back online the app will reload automatically.

Auth.title: Sign in
Auth.subtitle: Welcome to T4
Auth.completePhoneSubtitle: We need it to set up your stamp card.
Auth.codeSentTo: We sent a code to {phone} via WhatsApp
Auth.errorOtpFailed: The code is incorrect or expired
Auth.errorGoogleFailed: We couldn't sign you in with Google
Auth.errorForbidden: You don't have access to that section. Sign in with an authorized account.
Auth.intro1Sub: Collect stamps on every purchase and redeem them for free drinks.
Auth.intro2Sub: Rewards, surprises and perks just for the community.

Auth.otpError: That code isn't right 🙈 Try again.
